## Feature PR

## Problem / opportunity

- What user or developer problem does this solve?

## Proposed solution

- High-level description of implementation
- Alternatives considered (optional)

## Impact

- [ ] API behavior changed
- [ ] UI behavior changed
- [ ] Data/storage behavior changed
- [ ] No user-visible behavior change

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m compileall app`
- [ ] Relevant manual checks completed
- [ ] Tests added/updated (if applicable)

## Follow-ups

- Future work or known limitations:
